Defendant Moran's Car Dtore, Inc., DBA Sir Richard's Car Store Outlet's demurrer to 2nd amended complaint is overruled as to the 3rd, 5th and 6th causes of action, sustained with 10 days leave to amend as to the 7th cause of action to allege that a fee was charged in connection with a down payment.

MOTION TO STRIKE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-18-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
For defendant and moving party Moran's Car Store, Inc., DBA Sir Richard's Car Store Outlet, Jennifer L. Sommer, Esq. LAW OFFICES OF MARK R. MITTELMAN, 190 North Wiget Lane, Suite 101, Walnut Creek, CA 94598, 925-256-0677
For plaintiff and opposing party Phelia McLean, Jaimie Mak, LOUIS A. LIBERTY, 539 Middlefield Road, Redwood City, CA 94063, 650-562-3200

Ruling:
Defendant Moran's Car Store, Inc., dba Sir Richard's Car Store Outlet's motion to strike 2nd amended complaint is granted in part. Negligent misrepresentation does not support punitive damages not available for breach of contract. Allegations re piercing the corporation veil are inadequate, but should have been challenged by demurrer. Same goes to the allegations of corporate ratification. Reported by Christina Paxton, CSR #1558 (301/jlw/dm)
